'''nazhoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yahoodom|yahoodom]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yahoodom|yahoodom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nazhoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næzhereth|næzhereth]] || [[word:næzherej|næzherej]] || [[word:næzheresh|næzheresh]] || [[word:næzhere|næzhere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nazhozhoroth|nazhozhoroth]] || [[word:nazhozhoroj|nazhozhoroj]] || [[word:nazhozhorosh|nazhozhorosh]] || [[word:nazhozhoro|nazhozhoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nazhoroth|nazhoroth]] || [[word:nazhoroj|nazhoroj]] || [[word:nazhorosh|nazhorosh]] || [[word:nazhoro|nazhoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nazhofroth|nazhofroth]] || [[word:nazhofroj|nazhofroj]] || [[word:nazhofrosh|nazhofrosh]] || [[word:nazhofrof|nazhofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nazhorotho|nazhorotho]] || [[word:nazhorojo|nazhorojo]] || [[word:nazhorosho|nazhorosho]] || [[word:nazhoroko|nazhoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nazhoroth|nazhoroth]] || [[word:nazhoroj|nazhoroj]] || [[word:nazhorosh|nazhorosh]] || [[word:nazhoro|nazhoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nazhorothol|nazhorothol]] || [[word:nazhorojol|nazhorojol]] || [[word:nazhoroshol|nazhoroshol]] || [[word:nazhorokol|nazhorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nazhorothotho|nazhorothotho]] || [[word:nazhorojojo|nazhorojojo]] || [[word:nazhoroshosho|nazhoroshosho]] || [[word:nazhoroko|nazhoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nazhorothon|nazhorothon]] || [[word:nazhorojon|nazhorojon]] || [[word:nazhoroshon|nazhoroshon]] || [[word:nazhorokon|nazhorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nazhorothoro|nazhorothoro]] || [[word:nazhorojoro|nazhorojoro]] || [[word:nazhoroshoro|nazhoroshoro]] || [[word:nazhorokoro|nazhorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
